notes: Adaptor exposes a single generic getFHIR(path, params) operation that GETs {baseUrl}/api/api_fhir_r4/{path} (plus an internal login POST). No machine-readable spec is published upstream, so this OpenAPI doc was authored by hand from the openIMIS FHIR R4 module docs and source. Covers 14 FHIR resources with search (Bundle) + read-by-id operations plus login = 29 ops. FHIR resource schemas are focused/simplified (not the full HL7 R4 element set). openIMIS also supports POST/PUT/DELETE on these resources, but the adaptor only issues GET, so only read operations are modelled.
